mechanism_text_snippets: The general reaction is attack of hydroxide on the aldehyde, while the terminal aldehyde hydride is transferred to the sulfido ligand of Mo. There are two half reactions that occur in the enzyme which are independent in as much as they can be uncoupled under certain conditions. CobH is one of a few known enzymes that catalyse pericyclic reactions.
